case_title: EARL'S ORGANIC PRODUCE, INC. VS. UPTOWN JUICE COMPANY, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61171807)
